review_title: Better AI adoption for the whole team compared to ChatGPT
description: The support from the Team-GPT team was great. It's such a great product!
author: Filip S.
pros: The interface is very intuitive and we were able to collaborate on AI chats together with my team. Compared to other tools such as ChatGPT, collaboration really makes the difference when actual adoption of AI happens in the team. We liked the ability to work with images and other media inside the chats - it's great to use AI with different modalities.
cons: It takes a few minutes to set up your AI API keys but that's just a simple step compared to the benefits for data privacy that you'll get.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The best tool for adopting AI in your organization
description: I am very satisfied with the product and rate of improvements we are seeing. The guys from Team-GPT are very responsive and helpful with questions we have had (i.e. we recently needed to correct our invoicing details, which was not available in the UI, but the team assisted us in quickly resolving the issue). The feedback from team members has been great and we plan to continue using Team-GPT for empowering our organization with the latest AI developments.
author: Tihomir P.
pros: Team-GPT is a simple and cost-effective way of introducing the latest AI capabilities to your organization. Its focus is on introducing people to these emerging technologies, as well as making collaboration and sharing institutional knowledge easy and effective.
cons: Honestly, there are no major cons. One aspect that is important, but can be improved is making users more aware of the size and importance of LLM context, which is not vrey intuitive and visible to newcomers.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Terrible software
description: Would not recommend. Def not worth it .
author: Emily C.
pros: It allowed us to collaborate students for a class.
cons: No data export ability. Completely worthless.

review_title: The best tool for Non-tech people to start using AI
author: Emil G.
pros: The ease of use and set up - it was just a few clicks and here you go. I also like that it is saving you money as multiple people use the same account for Open AI (or Claude 3) for example. I also like the trainings and the preconfigured prompts. SUper useful
cons: The only thing I am currently missing is integration with MS Teams or/and Slack. If that is in place the usage will go dramatically up.

review_title: Team-GPT is the best model agnostic AI collaboratin tool out there!
description: 10/10 - would recommend to every team or company that would like to integrate AI in their workflow
author: Yavor B.
pros: Everything 1. Collaboration 2. Being able to use any model 3. Sharing the resources , chats prompt with the whole team -> this is crucial when you use AI at work
cons: Slight learning curve - but still this is due to the nature of the AI technologies which are quite new

review_title: Basic pros and cons to Team GPT
author: Chris P.
pros: Easy file management Shared access for coworkers Private chats are great for testing out things before making them public Personas are good for saving time Claude integration is amazing although you can't have GPT running at the same time Access to GPT 4 for the whole team I like the comments but they're made for completing them I instead use it for taking notes The tokens used bar is really helpful for budgeting and also to keep the chats concise and on track
cons: Don't have the option to go back to your original message after you edit the message like you can in ChatGPT DALL·E is a disappointing image generator
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The Best Value for The Money
description: It does the job for our team collaboration and it's well-priced.
author: Ruben N.
pros: It solved our team problem by allowing us to collaborate in chatGPT.
cons: Mobile App like OpenAI ChatGPT would be perfect! and also, mobile site is not user friendly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A Solid Way to Centralize Team Input Without Losing Momentum
description: It’s a practical tool for async collaboration, especially when you’re working with people across time zones or juggling multiple priorities. It helps keep thinking organized and lets everyone contribute without slowing things down. Once you get the hang of how to structure your work in it, it becomes a go-to.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It simplifies group workflows that usually turn chaotic. Being able to share prompts, collaborate on threads, and see team input in one place makes it feel more focused and less fragmented. I’ve used it to workshop drafts, outline processes, and test variations before pushing anything live. It speeds things up without sacrificing clarity.
cons: Permissions and visibility can be a little confusing at first. If you’re not careful about who can see or edit what, things can get messy quickly. I’ve had to double check settings more than I’d like just to make sure the right people were looped in.

review_title: Real value in long term use
description: I started using this more than a year ago. The app was already handy initially, especially in allowing collaboration. It has been continuously improving and getting better each day. The workspace is improved for the detailed organisation of chats, which brings real value to me, especially in long-term use. Moving between topics and tasks and returning to the topics created earlier now provides real value. A little more improvement will make it one of my go-to business apps, especially while working with clients.
author: Teoman A.
pros: - Provides a well-structured workspace; chats can be organised in various ways - Allows using models of different LLM providers. Users can select the most muscular model for their specific tasks or use different models for a task and select/combine the results for their best use - Enables collaboration between users using AI, allows prompting in the same context window with more than one user
cons: The interface can seem overwhelming at first. Users must spend time learning all the functionalities provided by the app.

review_title: The BEST tool for ChatGPT
author: Julian S.
pros: I love that I can have all my team in one account for creating chats. It saves you a LOT of money for adding users. I love the folders feature for organization. I love being able to add comments on specific chats as well.
cons: I can't complain about this tool. This is a fantastic tool.

review_title: Team GPT is My Top AI Tool
description: Simply brilliant! I love a piece of software that I was able to configure and use from the first day which has integrated all my chats from different accounts into one single platform and is now also able to connect to other AI providers as well as doing image generation. It has replaced my use of Chat GPT, as the UI is way better and makes me more productive.
author: Giorgio S.
pros: Easy to organise and keeping all AI generated materials in one place. How it integrates with other AI platforms and how easy and simple it is to change the model you want to use for a particular AI Chat.
cons: My usage went up somewhat using my own API key compared to just using Chat GPT, however the quality of the output was worth it.

review_title: Team-GPT in webb development
author: Gustav J.
pros: The ability to easily distribute access to OpenAIs services throughout the organisation. This was what originally drove us to start using Team-GPT.
cons: We found it difficult to enable our software teams to use the collaboration feature. This might be due to the fact that it still feels a little private giving everyone access to your search history, basically. Would you want to share your Google history open with everyone?
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best in class AI interface!
author: Konstantin G.
pros: Practical interface. Great for sharing prompts with teams. Great tips for prompt engineering. Always getting new features.
cons: UI could still be more refined; it's a complex software.

review_title: Saving huge on ChatGpt Subscription
author: Vikas T.
pros: I like the concept, easy-to-use UI, affordable pricing, and everything else about Team-GPT. It is saving me money. I bought it for my team, and Team-GPT does the same and more.
cons: Can't think of any. It is doing more than what I assumed.

review_title: The best collaborative tool out there!
author: Kate V.
pros: This is my number one tool for everyday jobs like writing emails, posting blogs, and coming up with ideas. It's an awesome tool to work together with others. And the Edit with AI feature is amazing. You can fix up your chats right inside the tool, so you don't have to go somewhere else to edit. It's all about making things easy and quick!
cons: This is a great tool. I really like the fact that you are constantly improving it. It will be great if you can introduce folder permissions soon.

review_title: powerful tool to speed up daily tasks
description: Overall, my experience with Team-GPT has been positive. The core AI technology is incredibly powerful for augmenting team collaboration and knowledge sharing. However, the product still feels somewhat unrefined around the edges. More robust customization, tighter integration with workplace apps, and a smoother UI would take it to the next level. But the potential is massive if the developers can smooth out the current rough patches.
author: Sam B.
pros: Seamless integration of GPT language model into team workflows Ability to query the AI assistant during meetings/discussions for real-time insights Solid natural language understanding and generation capabilities Constantly improving with more training data
cons: Occasional nonsensical or factually incorrect responses from the AI Limited customization options for fine-tuning the language model Pricing model could be more flexible for smaller teams User interface is a bit clunky and unintuitive at times
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Team-GPT Review
author: Siobhan B.
pros: I like the ability to categorize chats and select from which engine to use.
cons: It's frustrating when the chat runs out of memory so I need to copy knowledge over to a new conversation to continue the same conversation. I would also like if the Team-GPT team prioritized adding file ingestion like is available on the paid membership of Chat GPT.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: amazing for everything
author: Derek K.
pros: It speeds up the work process 10x, and makes everything easier.
cons: Too clouded with features and is a bit overwhelming.

review_title: Easy to use with great collaboration tools
author: Haris K.
pros: 1. ability to configure prompts 2. share chat exchanges with other members in the team 3. forking of chat 4. edit specific parts of the responses based on tone
cons: nothing, Team got does very well in terms of utility.

review_title: Perfect adaptation of ChatGPT into my team
author: Lukas D.
pros: Professional UI, additional functionality, constant updates
cons: nothing, I like it as it is and how it works

review_title: Team report
author: Nikola A.
pros: AWS command answers in ordar to setup infrastructure.
cons: It does not support foreign languages...
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Product but missing one big feature
author: matteo P.
pros: The different chats are practical. And also the fast model change
cons: The Plugins are missing. And also the Custom GPT
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Opening My Eyes to the Possibilities
author: John K.
pros: Easy-to-use and intuitive. The responses are generally sufficient or more than sufficient.
cons: Some of the guard rails restrict legitimate uses. The word "terrorist," for example triggers a block no matter the context. (I was looking for information on counter-efforts).
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Reviewing Team-GPT
description: Great AI tool for the workplace; provides a viable, safe alternative to free AI chatbots.
author: Aner S.
pros: I enjoyed the ability to use folders and organise chat better than other competitors of yours.
cons: I thought the user interface was feeling a bit old fashioned or not so modern.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
